scripts.pretest: pnpm --filter @darkauth/client build && pnpm --filter @DarkAuth/admin-ui build && pnpm --filter @DarkAuth/user-ui build && pnpm --filter @DarkAuth/demo-app build
scripts.test: pnpm run pretest && PW_REPORTER=dot PW_ARTIFACTS=off pnpm exec playwright test --reporter=dot
scripts.test:screenshots: export APP_VERSION="${APP_VERSION:-$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || printf 1.0.0)}" COMMIT_HASH="${COMMIT_HASH:-$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf local)}"; rm -rf test-results-light test-results-dark && pnpm run pretest && (COLOR_SCHEME=light PW_REPORTER=dot PW_ARTIFACTS=on pnpm exec playwright test --reporter=dot --workers=1 --output=test-results-light) && (COLOR_SCHEME=dark PW_REPORTER=dot PW_ARTIFACTS=on pnpm exec playwright test --reporter=dot --workers=1 --output=test-results-dark) && node ../brochureware/scripts/collect-screenshots.js
scripts.test:report: pnpm run pretest && PW_REPORTER=html PW_ARTIFACTS=on pnpm exec playwright test --reporter=html && pnpm exec playwright show-report
